column1: # simple-search gold set  --  query <TAB> input <TAB> dict <TAB> intended_dicthw <TAB> note <TAB> expect
# intended_dicthw is the SLP1 headword the user most likely wants.
# An empty intended marks a "should return nothing" (zero-result) case.
# Rows whose key is not in fixtures.json are scored only with --live (skipped offline).
# expect (6th column, optional): "aspirational" marks a row DESIGNED to miss
# under v1.1/v1.2 as specified (Stream-A lemmatization targets, or a ranking
# constraint the design intentionally keeps below rank 1) -- such rows are still
# scored and printed, but excluded from the recall@5 gate denominator and
# reported in a separate "aspirational" bucket (H122/M1; see eval/readme.md).
# Seeded 2026-06-11 from live MW responses (output=iast). Expand with scholarly judgement.
